title: Artifact Envelope
description: Canonical outer metadata carried by all governed artifacts to support interoperability across coordination, work, and review flows.

artifact_id.description: Stable identifier for the specific artifact instance.

artifact_class.description: Canonical class used for governance routing.

contract_name.description: Authoritative contract name that defines the payload schema.

contract_version.description: Semantic version of the payload contract.

lifecycle_stage.description: Lifecycle state for routing, retention, and review.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this artifact instance was created.

derived_from.description: Parent artifact identifiers that this artifact depends on.

study_id.description: Study identifier when the artifact belongs to a study bundle.

meeting_id.description: Meeting identifier when the artifact is tied to a session.

review_cycle_id.description: Review cycle identifier when the artifact participates in adjudication.

tags.description: Free-form labels to aid discovery and filtering.

payload.description: Contract-specific payload carried inside the envelope.

name.description: Human-readable name of the producing agent.

role.description: Role performed when producing the artifact (e.g., reviewer, orchestrator).

organization.description: Organization responsible for the producing agent.

contact.description: Contact info for the producing agent.

run_id.description: Run identifier from the producing workflow, when applicable.
